creator: luigi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I cannot reproduce the problem here. Unless the problem is different 
(e.g. trying to set too large a bandwidth, e.g. 1000Mbytes/s, which 
triggers a different bug which I just fixed), or the 
originator can give additional info on how to reproduce it, 
I am inclined to close this PR.
